hero.headlinePrefix: Everything that matters for the people you care for,
hero.subheading: Shared calendar, messages, medical appointments, school details, and documents. Without switching apps.

problem.description: Messages in one place, calendar in another, school in its portal, and the doctor somewhere else. Information gets lost and nobody has the full picture.

items.messages: Scattered chats and emails between caregivers
items.calendar: Appointments and reminders across several apps
items.documents: Documents and permissions in different places
items.healthSchool: No single place for health and school

solution.description: coCare is a hub for a person or family: shared calendar, messaging, tasks, documents, and health details in one app. Built for collaboration, not conflict.

family.title: By person or family
family.description: Everything about who you care for, or your family, in one shared space.

aligned.title: Everyone stays aligned
aligned.description: Caregivers and family members share the same information without duplicated effort.

singleApp.title: No app switching
singleApp.description: Messages, calendar, appointments, and documents live in coCare.

appPreview.description: Everything you need in one place. Available across all your devices.

messages.one: Hi, can I pick up Lucas today at 3?
messages.two: Yes, perfect. He leaves at 3:15 by the main door.
messages.three: Great. Should I bring his swim bag?
messages.four: Please, he has class tomorrow at 9.

features.description: Designed for separated families, elder caregivers, and anyone coordinating care for multiple people.

calendar.title: Shared calendar
calendar.description: Events, appointments, and reminders in one calendar for the whole family or care team.

messages.title: Family messaging
messages.description: Threads by topic or person, with all the context in one place.

profiles.title: Profiles and health
profiles.description: Health information, school details, emergency contacts, and documents in one profile per person.

documents.title: Documents in one place
documents.description: Permissions, reports, prescriptions, and important papers organized for the people who need access.

alts.homework: Parent helping a child with homework

testimonials.description: Real stories from people transforming the way they coordinate care.

mariana.quote: My ex and I finally have the same information about pediatric appointments. There are no more 'I didn't know' excuses.
mariana.name: Mariana R.

carmen.quote: As a grandmother, I just want to know when it is my turn to pick them up and whether they have homework. coCare makes it easy.
carmen.name: Carmen

lucia.quote: I care for three children from different families. Having everything in one place saves me hours every week.
lucia.name: Lucia G.

faq.description: Everything you need to know about coCare.

pricing.question: Is coCare free?
pricing.answer: We are in beta. Early waitlist users will get free launch access and special discounts on paid plans.

privacy.question: Who can see my family information?
privacy.answer: Only the people you invite. Each caregiver sees only what you choose to share. Your information is never sold or shared with third parties.

separated.question: Does it work for separated or divorced families?
separated.answer: Yes. coCare is designed for families where several caregivers need to coordinate, including separated parents, grandparents, nannies, and anyone involved in care.

elderCare.question: Can I use it to coordinate care for an older adult?
elderCare.answer: Absolutely. coCare works for coordinating care for children, older adults, or any family member who needs attention from several caregivers.

devices.question: Which devices does it support?
devices.answer: coCare will be available as an iOS and Android app, plus a web version accessible from any browser.

launch.question: When does coCare launch?
launch.answer: We are working toward a 2026 launch. Join the waitlist to be among the first to try it and receive updates.

cta.description: We will let you know when coCare is available. No spam.
cta.privacy: Your information is safe. We do not share your data.

waitlistForm.success: Thank you. We will let you know when coCare is available.

footer.tagline: Everything in one place for the people you care for.
